question: Implement a function in C++ that receives a string and converts all its characters to uppercase using pass-by-reference. Signature: void convertToUppercase(std::string& str);

test_cases.expected:
Original: hello world
Uppercase: HELLO WORLD

Original: c++ language
Uppercase: C++ LANGUAGE

errors: No validation for empty strings; hardcoded test value instead of user input; doesn't handle Unicode characters properly; no error handling for special cases
